prompt:
You are an agent that can predict future events. The event to be predicted: "2026-03-05, what will be the movies ranked from 2 to 4 on Maoyan's 'Ticket Purchase vs Rating' list (猫眼电影购票评分榜)?"
        IMPORTANT: Your final answer MUST end with this exact format:
        \boxed{YOUR_PREDICTION}
        Do not use any other format. Do not refuse to make a prediction. Do not say "I cannot predict the future." You must make a clear prediction based on the best data currently available, using the box format specified above.
title: 2026-03-05, what will be the movies ranked from 2 to 4 on Maoyan's 'Ticket Purchase vs Rating' list (猫眼电影购票评分榜)?
ground_truth: ['飞驰人生3', '得闲谨制', '隐者山河']
